rationale: For a cooking and pantry tracking app, trust, warmth, and a sensory appeal are paramount. A clinical dark mode doesn't feel appetizing. Warm earthy tones allow food imagery to stand out while conveying health and freshness.

headings.rules: Never center by default. Use fluid scaling for H1.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use p-6, p-8, or p-12 for containers.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2C5545] text-[#FDFBF7] rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#3D6F5B] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8ECE1] text-[#2C5545] rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#D5DCC9] transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-white border border-[#E2E0D8] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2C5545] focus:border-transparent transition-all

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, floating navs, filter bars

badges.style: bg-[#E8ECE1] text-[#2C5545] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider

rules.shadcn: Heavily customize Shadcn components to remove the 'Vercel' look. Replace standard border-radius with rounded-2xl/3xl. Use warm tinted greys instead of default slates.
rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format based on role.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight to match the tactile earthy aesthetic.

images.description: App logo with stylized leaf and fork
Graphic for the 'Scan Receipt or Barcode' feature
Empty pantry shelf illustration for onboarding or empty states

interactions_and_motion.hover: Scale up slightly (transform scale-105) for image cards. Buttons should shift background color smoothly.
interactions_and_motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up animations for dashboard bento grids using framer-motion.
interactions_and_motion.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus rings are highly visible (ring-2 ring-accent offset-2).

instructions_to_main_agent: Setup Tailwind config to use the custom colors (primary, secondary, accent, destructive, background, text).
Customize Shadcn components heavily: modify standard borders, increase border radius to match rounded-2xl/3xl, use the defined earthy typography.
Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Dashboard (pantry tracker, quick recipes, expiring soon).
Integrate the scan receipt graphic into an upload/scan widget component.
Include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="recipe-generate-btn"') for all interactive elements.
Use framer-motion for smooth staggered list animations on the recipes list.
DO NOT use Inter or generic slates. The UI must feel warm, organic, and appetizing.
